full_text:
Ren Ao 任燠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ren Ao (任燠)was born in Le’an Commandery. Governed Qinghe commandery as a model administrator. Ren Ao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
